description: PRD 00: Infraestrutura & Fundação — prepara o esqueleto do FitHub (Laravel 12 + MySQL 8): limpa legado, instala Horizon/Telescope/Predis, migrations de todas as tabelas de domínio com UUIDs, error handler JSON padronizado pt-BR, rate limiting, Sanctum device-aware, logs estruturados, AiService stub, FCM channel stub, API versioning consolidado e schedules. Base obrigatória para todos os domínios subsequentes. Arquitetura Clean (Domain/Application/Infrastructure) já adotada — manter. Error shape mantido como { error: { code, message, details } } por compatibilidade com ARCH-002.

userStories.title: Limpar código legado (controllers, models, migrations de domínio)
userStories.description: Como arquiteto, quero remover controllers, models e migrations antigas do FitAI para começar a implementação do FitHub sem conflitos.
acceptanceCriteria: Controllers removidos de app/Http/Controllers/: AuthController, GoalController, LeaderboardController, OnboardingController, ProfileController
Controllers removidos de app/Http/Controllers/Api/V1/: AiMealPlanController, AiPlanController, MealLogController, RankingController, WorkoutLogController
Rotas de domínio removidas de routes/api.php — resta apenas Route::prefix('v1')->group vazio

Models removidos de app/Models/: Achievement, AiPlan, DailyActivityLimit, Exercise, MealLog, PlanMeal, PlanWorkout, PlanWorkoutExercise, UserAchievement, UserGamification, UserGoal, UserOnboarding, WorkoutExerciseLog, WorkoutLog, XpTransaction (mantém User, PersonalAccessToken)

Migrations removidas: 2026_03_06_200851_a até f, 2026_03_06_200852_z_create_fitai_views, 2026_03_09_201607_add_profile_fields_to_users_table, 2026_03_15_195725_add_ai_fields_to_tracking_logs_table, 2026_03_20_165207_update_gamification_tables_for_new_rules, 2026_03_23_154815_add_updated_at_to_tracking_tables
Factories, Seeders, Resources, Requests, UseCases, Repositories e DTOs dos domínios removidos também são apagados
app/Services/GeminiService.php removido (será substituído por AiService stub)
app/Http/Controllers/Controller.php base mantido
composer dump-autoload executa sem warnings
php artisan route:list executa sem erro
Tests pass

userStories.title: Instalar dependências (Horizon, Telescope, Predis)
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero instalar Horizon, Telescope e Predis para habilitar filas, debugging e conexão Redis.
acceptanceCriteria: composer require laravel/horizon predis/predis executa com sucesso
composer require --dev laravel/telescope executa com sucesso
php artisan horizon:install e telescope:install publicam assets e configs
Sanctum permanece em ^4.3 (já instalado — não reinstalar)
.env.example inclui QUEUE_CONNECTION=redis, CACHE_STORE=redis, SESSION_DRIVER=redis, BROADCAST_CONNECTION=log, REDIS_HOST=127.0.0.1, REDIS_PASSWORD=null, REDIS_PORT=6379
config/hashing.php tem bcrypt rounds 12
php artisan config:clear executa sem erro
Tests pass

userStories.title: Criar estrutura de camadas, Enums e BaseDTO
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero validar a estrutura Clean Architecture e criar classes base para DTOs, Repositories e a pasta app/Enums.
acceptanceCriteria: Diretórios existem: app/Application/UseCases/, app/Domain/, app/Infrastructure/Repositories/, app/DTOs/, app/Services/, app/Enums/
app/DTOs/BaseDTO.php é classe abstrata com método estático fromArray(array $data): static usando late static binding

app/Infrastructure/Repositories/BaseRepository.php é classe abstrata recebendo Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model no construtor, expondo findOrFail(string $id), create(array $data), update(Model $model, array $data), delete(Model $model)
Namespace PSR-4 App\Enums\ funciona (composer dump-autoload sem warnings)
Tests pass

userStories.title: Migration: users (recriar com campos FitHub completos)
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, preciso recriar users incluindo todos os campos do briefing FitHub (username, avatar, bio, gender, weight_kg, height_cm, primary_goal, fitness_level, xp_points, level, fcm_token, last_login_at).
acceptanceCriteria: Migration 0001_01_01_000000_create_users_table.php recriada

Campos: id uuid PK, name string, email string unique, email_verified_at timestamp nullable, password string, username string unique, avatar string nullable, bio text nullable, birth_date date nullable, gender enum male/female/other nullable, weight_kg decimal(5,2) nullable, height_cm decimal(5,2) nullable, primary_goal enum lose_weight/gain_muscle/improve_endurance/general_health nullable, fitness_level enum beginner/intermediate/advanced nullable, xp_points integer default 0, level integer default 1, fcm_token string nullable, is_active boolean default true, last_login_at timestamp nullable, remember_token, timestamps, softDeletes
Índice único em email e username
Model User mantém HasUuids, fillable ajustado, casts (birth_date, last_login_at, weight_kg, height_cm, xp_points, level, is_active)
Factory UserFactory atualizada
php artisan migrate:fresh executa sem erro
Tests pass

userStories.title: Migration: password_reset_tokens + personal_access_tokens com tokenable uuid
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, preciso tabelas de reset de senha e tokens Sanctum com tokenable_id uuid compatível com PK UUID de users.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration create_password_reset_tokens_table criada (email PK string, token string, created_at timestamp nullable)

Migration personal_access_tokens recriada: id bigint auto-increment, tokenable_type varchar, tokenable_id CHAR(36), name string, token string unique, abilities text nullable, last_used_at timestamp nullable, expires_at timestamp nullable, timestamps; índice composto (tokenable_type, tokenable_id)
php artisan migrate:fresh executa sem erro
Login stub emite token que resolve $request->user() corretamente
Tests pass

userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, preciso criar user_health_profiles com dados de saúde (alergias, preferências, lesões, equipamentos).
acceptanceCriteria: Migration create_user_health_profiles_table: id uuid PK, user_id foreignUuid unique references users cascadeOnDelete, allergies json nullable, food_preferences json nullable, food_restrictions json nullable, injuries json nullable, available_equipment json nullable, workout_days_per_week integer default 3, workout_duration_minutes integer default 60, timestamps

User model recebe hasOne(UserHealthProfile::class)
Factory UserHealthProfileFactory
php artisan migrate:fresh executa sem erro
Tests pass

acceptanceCriteria: Migration create_goals_table: id uuid PK, user_id foreignUuid cascadeOnDelete, title string, type enum (weight_loss/muscle_gain/distance/calories/workout_frequency/custom), target_value decimal(10,2), current_value decimal(10,2) default 0, initial_value decimal(10,2) nullable, unit string, deadline date nullable, visibility enum(public/friends/private) default private, status enum(active/completed/archived/expired) default active, completed_at timestamp nullable, timestamps, softDeletes
Índice composto (user_id, status)

userStories.title: Migration: fitness_plans + plan_days + plan_items + plan_comments (modelo unificado)
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, preciso criar o modelo unificado de planos (workout e nutrition) com dias, items e comentários.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration create_fitness_plans_table: id uuid PK, user_id foreignUuid cascadeOnDelete, type enum(workout/nutrition), title string, status enum(generating/active/archived/failed) default generating, version integer default 1, generated_at timestamp nullable, job_id string nullable, raw_prompt text nullable, raw_response longText nullable, timestamps, softDeletes; índice (user_id, status, type)
Migration create_plan_days_table: id uuid PK, fitness_plan_id foreignUuid cascadeOnDelete, day_of_week enum monday..sunday, title string nullable, notes text nullable, order integer, timestamps

Migration create_plan_items_table: id uuid PK, plan_day_id foreignUuid cascadeOnDelete, name string, description text nullable, type enum(exercise/meal/supplement), sets integer nullable, reps integer nullable, duration_seconds integer nullable, rest_seconds integer nullable, weight_kg decimal(5,2) nullable, calories integer nullable, protein_g decimal(6,2) nullable, carbs_g decimal(6,2) nullable, fat_g decimal(6,2) nullable, order integer, is_completed boolean default false, completed_at timestamp nullable, timestamps

Migration create_plan_comments_table: id uuid PK, fitness_plan_id foreignUuid cascadeOnDelete, user_id foreignUuid cascadeOnDelete, target_type enum(plan/day/item), target_id uuid nullable, comment text, is_processed boolean default false, processed_at timestamp nullable, timestamps
Models FitnessPlan, PlanDay, PlanItem, PlanComment com HasUuids, fillable, casts, relationships
Enums PlanType, PlanStatus, DayOfWeek, PlanItemType, PlanCommentTarget em app/Enums/
Factories para os 4 models
php artisan migrate:fresh executa sem erro
Tests pass

Migration ajustada para notifiable_id CHAR(36) (uuid) compatível com User
Índice composto (notifiable_type, notifiable_id) presente
php artisan migrate:fresh executa sem erro
Tests pass

userStories.title: Error handler centralizado pt-BR com shape { error: { code, message, details } }
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero consolidar os handlers de erro em bootstrap/app.php mantendo o shape já adotado no ARCH-002 e traduzindo mensagens para pt-BR.
acceptanceCriteria: bootstrap/app.php withExceptions handlers para: ValidationException 422 code VALIDATION_ERROR details=campos, ModelNotFoundException 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND 'Recurso não encontrado', AuthenticationException 401 UNAUTHENTICATED 'Não autenticado', AuthorizationException 403 FORBIDDEN 'Ação não autorizada', ThrottleRequestsException 429 TOO_MANY_REQUESTS 'Muitas requisições', NotFoundHttpException 404 NOT_FOUND 'Endpoint não encontrado', BadRequestHttpException 400 BAD_REQUEST, Throwable 500 SERVER_ERROR
Mensagens default em pt-BR
Shape uniforme: { error: { code: string, message: string, details: object } } — NUNCA { message, errors }
Handler só dispara para rotas api/* ou $request->expectsJson()
Feature test tests/Feature/ErrorHandlerTest.php valida shapes 404, 401, 403, 422, 429
Tests pass

userStories.title: Rate limiters nomeados (auth, api, ai-plans, leaderboard)
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero definir rate limiters para proteger endpoints críticos.
acceptanceCriteria: RateLimiter::for('auth', fn ($r) => Limit::perMinute(5)->by($r->ip()))
RateLimiter::for('api', fn ($r) => Limit::perMinute(60)->by($r->user()?->id ?: $r->ip()))
RateLimiter::for('ai-plans', fn ($r) => Limit::perHour(3)->by($r->user()?->id ?: $r->ip()))
RateLimiter::for('leaderboard', fn ($r) => Limit::perMinute(30)->by($r->user()?->id ?: $r->ip()))
Limiters registrados em AppServiceProvider::boot()
Feature test valida que throttle:auth bloqueia após 5 requests
Tests pass

userStories.title: Sanctum device-aware token expiration (mobile 7d, web 1d)
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero que o LoginUserUseCase emita tokens com expiração distinta por device.
acceptanceCriteria: config/sanctum.php com 'expiration' => 60 * 24
LoginUserUseCase aceita parâmetro string $device (mobile|web)
device=mobile cria token com expires_at = now()->addDays(7)
device=web cria token com expires_at = now()->addDay()
LoginRequest valida device com in:mobile,web nullable (default web)
Unit test em tests/Unit/Application/UseCases/Auth/LoginUserUseCaseTest.php valida ambos os caminhos
Tests pass

userStories.title: Horizon configurado com supervisores nomeados
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero configurar supervisores Horizon para ai-plans, notifications e default.
acceptanceCriteria: config/horizon.php environments local e production com 3 supervisores: ai-plans (queue ai-plans, minProcesses 2 maxProcesses 5), notifications (queue notifications, minProcesses 2 maxProcesses 4), default (queue default, minProcesses 1 maxProcesses 3)
app/Providers/HorizonServiceProvider.php gate() retorna true em local ou para admins placeholder
php artisan horizon:status não retorna exception fatal
php artisan config:clear sem erro
Tests pass

userStories.title: Telescope restrito ao ambiente local
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero que o Telescope rode apenas em local.
acceptanceCriteria: TelescopeServiceProvider::gate() retorna app()->environment('local')
config/telescope.php com 'enabled' => env('TELESCOPE_ENABLED', false)
.env.example com TELESCOPE_ENABLED=true
AppServiceProvider::register() registra TelescopeServiceProvider apenas em local
Migrations do Telescope executam em php artisan migrate:fresh
Tests pass

userStories.title: Canal de log estruturado (JSON daily)
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero um canal de log que escreva JSON estruturado para auditoria.
acceptanceCriteria: config/logging.php define channel structured: driver daily, days 14, level debug, formatter Monolog JsonFormatter
stack default inclui ['single', 'structured']
Log::channel('structured')->info('test', ['user_id' => 'x']) grava linha JSON válida em storage/logs/structured-*.log
Unit test valida que linha escrita é JSON parseável com keys esperadas (message, context.user_id)
Tests pass

userStories.title: SecurityHeadersMiddleware no grupo api
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero adicionar headers de segurança em todas as respostas da API.
acceptanceCriteria: app/Http/Middleware/SecurityHeadersMiddleware.php criado

Headers adicionados: X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, Referrer-Policy: no-referrer, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains apenas se $request->isSecure()
Registrado no grupo api em bootstrap/app.php via ->withMiddleware(fn($m) => $m->api(append: [SecurityHeadersMiddleware::class]))
Feature test valida presença dos 3 headers non-HSTS em response de endpoint de teste
Tests pass

userStories.title: AiService interface + FakeAiService stub
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero uma interface AiServiceInterface e implementação Fake determinística para substituir chamadas reais ao Gemini.
acceptanceCriteria: app/Services/Ai/AiServiceInterface.php declara generate(string $prompt): string
app/Services/Ai/FakeAiService.php implementa retornando JSON válido determinístico
JSON tem estrutura { plan_title: string, days: [ { day_of_week: string, items: [ { name, type, sets, reps, ... } ] } ] } com ≥1 day e ≥1 item
AppServiceProvider::register() faz $this->app->bind(AiServiceInterface::class, FakeAiService::class)
Unit test tests/Unit/Services/Ai/FakeAiServiceTest.php valida json_decode retornando array com key days não-vazia e cada day com items não-vazio
Tests pass

userStories.title: FcmChannel stub + Notifications base
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero um canal FCM que logue payloads (stub) para permitir uso de Notifications sem integração Firebase real.
acceptanceCriteria: app/Notifications/Channels/FcmChannel.php com send($notifiable, Notification $notification): void que chama $notification->toFcm($notifiable) e loga via Log::channel('structured')->info('fcm_notification', [...])
app/Notifications/Concerns/RoutesFcm.php trait com routeNotificationForFcm() retornando $this->fcm_token
User model usa trait RoutesFcm
Notification de teste resolve canal 'fcm' via array ['fcm' => FcmChannel::class] no NotificationServiceProvider
Unit test: Notification com via()=['fcm'] enviada para user com fcm_token gera entrada no log structured com payload
Tests pass

userStories.title: API versioning v1 consolidado
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero routes/api.php estruturado com prefixo v1 e nome api.v1.
acceptanceCriteria: routes/api.php tem Route::prefix('v1')->name('api.v1.')->group
Sub-grupo middleware auth:sanctum para rotas protegidas
Namespace dos futuros controllers será App\Http\Controllers\Api\V1\
php artisan route:list mostra rotas com prefixo api/v1/ ou lista vazia limpa
Tests pass

userStories.title: Schedules: RecalculateLeaderboardJob hourly + leaderboard:purge-old semanal
userStories.description: Como desenvolvedor, quero agendar recálculo do leaderboard e limpeza de snapshots antigos.
acceptanceCriteria: app/Jobs/RecalculateLeaderboardJob.php stub (queue default) que apenas loga — lógica real vem em GAM-03
app/Console/Commands/LeaderboardPurgeOldCommand.php signature 'leaderboard:purge-old' deleta leaderboard_snapshots where calculated_at < now()->subMonths(3) e loga count
routes/console.php: Schedule::job(new RecalculateLeaderboardJob)->hourly()
routes/console.php: Schedule::command('leaderboard:purge-old')->weeklyOn(0, '03:00')
php artisan schedule:list mostra ambos
Tests pass
